Title: Verify the suggestion page is displayed correctly
Preconditions: User is logged in and has a device with internet connection.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate to the suggestion page.
3. Verify that the page displays suggested places in the user's vicinity.
4. Verify that the suggested places are ordered based on their suitability to the current context.
Expected Result: The suggested places are displayed correctly on the screen.

Title: Verify the map page is displayed correctly
Preconditions: User is logged in and has a device with internet connection.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate to the suggestion page.
3. Tap on a suggested place.
4. Verify that the map page is displayed with the selected place marked.
Expected Result: The map page is displayed correctly with the selected place marked.

Title: Verify the user can rate a place
Preconditions: User is logged in and has a device with internet connection.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate to the suggestion page.
3. Tap on a suggested place.
4. Verify that the place details page is displayed.
5. Verify that the user can rate the place by selecting a star rating.
Expected Result: The user can rate the place by selecting a star rating.

Title: Verify the AI interaction works correctly
Preconditions: User is logged in and has a device with internet connection.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate to the suggestion page.
3. Tap on the AI interaction option.
4. Verify that the AI asks a series of questions to select a place.
5. Answer the questions as expected.
6. Verify that the application selects a place based on the user's answers.
Expected Result: The application selects a place based on the user's answers.

Title: Verify the suggestion algorithm works correctly
Preconditions: User is logged in and has a device with internet connection.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate to the suggestion page.
3. Verify that the suggested places are ordered based on their suitability to the current context.
Expected Result: The suggested places are ordered based on their suitability to the current context.

Title: Verify the recommendation frequency can be modified
Preconditions: User is logged in and has a device with internet connection.
Test Data: A specific category to modify the frequency of receiving recommendations for.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate to the settings page.
3. Modify the frequency of receiving recommendations for the specific category.
4. Verify that the frequency of receiving recommendations for the specific category is updated.
Expected Result: The frequency of receiving recommendations for the specific category is updated.

Title: Accessing the Suggestions Page
Preconditions: The application is installed on the device
Test Steps:
1. Open the application
2. Navigate to the Suggestions Page
Expected Result: The user can access the Suggestions Page and view the suggested locations on the map

Title: Accessing Detailed Page
Preconditions: A Detailed Page is selected
Test Steps: 1. Click on the Detailed Page
Expected Result:
1. Detailed information about the selected location is displayed
2. The location is displayed on a map
3. The user can mark the location as visited and like/dislike it
4. The user can call the location's phone number

Title: Opening Yelp Page on Browser
Preconditions: A Detailed Page is open
Test Steps: 1. Click on the link to Yelp page of the location
Expected Result:
1. The browser is opened
2. The Yelp page of the location is loaded and displayed

Title: Calling the Location
Preconditions:
1. A Detailed Page is open
2. The location has a phone number
Test Steps: 1. Click on the "Call Business" button
Expected Result: 1. A call is made to the location's phone number

Title: Viewing Suggestions
Preconditions: The Suggestions Page is open
Test Steps:
1. View the suggested locations
2. Scroll through the suggested locations
Expected Result: The user visualizes the suggested locations

Title: Viewing Map
Preconditions: The Suggestions Page or a Detailed Page is open
Test Steps:
1. View the map
2. Interact with the map
Expected Result: The user visualizes the map with the user's location and the suggested location's position marked

Title: Opening System Map
Preconditions: A page that displays the map is open
Test Steps: 1. Click on the button to open the system map
Expected Result:
1. The system map is opened
2. The suggested location is already set as the destination

Title: Accessing Settings Page
Preconditions: The Suggestions Page (main page) is open
Test Steps: 1. Click on the settings button, located on the right of the header
Expected Result:
1. The Settings Page is opened
2. The user's preferences are displayed
3. The user has the ability to modify their preferences

Title: Interacting with AI
Preconditions: The application is opened
Test Steps: 1. Ask a question to the AI
Expected Result: The AI generates a response to the question

Title: Open Yelp page of a suggested place
Preconditions: User is logged in and a suggested place is displayed
Test Data: A suggested place with a valid Yelp URL
Test Steps:
1. Click on the suggested place
2. Verify that the Yelp page of the selected place is opened
Expected Result: The Yelp page of the selected place is opened

Title: Use Pathfinder system
Preconditions: User is logged in and has provided preferences
Test Steps:
1. Answer questions about user preferences
2. Verify that the suggested place is based on user preferences
Expected Result: The suggested place is based on user preferences

Title: GPS Functionality
Preconditions: The application is running and has access to the GPS function.
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Check if the GPS function is enabled.
Expected Result: The GPS function is enabled and the application is able to get the user's location.

Title: Pathfinder Server Functionality
Preconditions: The application is running and the Pathfinder server is active.
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Check if the Pathfinder server is active.
Expected Result: The Pathfinder server is active and the application is able to communicate with it.

Title: Suggestions Functionality
Preconditions: The application is running and the GPS function is enabled.
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Check if suggestions for nearby places are displayed.
Expected Result: Suggestions for nearby places are displayed on the map.

Title: Navigation Functionality
Preconditions: The application is running, suggestions for nearby places are displayed, and a suggestion is selected.
Test Steps:
1. Select a suggestion from the list.
2. Check if the selected suggestion is opened in the system's navigation application.
Expected Result: The selected suggestion is opened in the system's navigation application and the map shows the location of the selected suggestion.

Title: Yelp Integration Functionality
Preconditions: The application is running and a suggestion is selected.
Test Steps:
1. Select a suggestion from the list.
2. Check if the Yelp page for the selected suggestion is opened in the system's browser.
Expected Result: The Yelp page for the selected suggestion is opened in the system's browser.

Title: Pathfinder Suggestions Functionality
Preconditions: The application is running, the Pathfinder server is active, and the Pathfinder page is opened.
Test Steps:
1. Open the Pathfinder page.
2. Check if a suggestion is displayed.
Expected Result: A suggestion is displayed.

Title: Verify Android version requirement
Preconditions: Device is turned on and connected to the internet
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application on the device
2. Check the device's Android version
Expected Result: The application should not launch and display an error message stating that the device's Android version is not compatible.

Title: Verify iOS version requirement
Preconditions: Device is turned on and connected to the internet
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application on the device
2. Check the device's iOS version
Expected Result: The application should not launch and display an error message stating that the device's iOS version is not compatible.

Title: Verify geolocation system requirement
Preconditions: Device is turned on and connected to the internet
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application on the device
2. Check if the application is able to access the device's geolocation
Expected Result: The application should not launch and display an error message stating that the device does not have a geolocation system.

Title: Verify storage space requirement
Preconditions: Device is turned on and connected to the internet
Test Data: Device with less than 100 MB of free storage space
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application on the device
2. Check the device's available storage space
Expected Result: The application should not launch and display an error message stating that the device does not have enough storage space.

Title: Verify internet connectivity requirement
Preconditions: Device is turned on and connected to the internet
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application on the device
2. Check if the application is able to connect to the internet
Expected Result: The application should not launch and display an error message stating that the device is offline.

Title: Verify business location within Yelp coverage area
Preconditions: Device is turned on and connected to the internet
Test Data: Business located outside of Yelp coverage area
Test Steps:
1. Search for a business on the application
2. Check if the business is within the Yelp coverage area
Expected Result: The application should not display the business and display an error message stating that the business is not within the Yelp coverage area.

Title: Verify user rating and review feature
Preconditions: Device is turned on and connected to the internet
Test Data: Business with no ratings or reviews
Test Steps:
1. Search for a business on the application
2. Check if the business has a rating and reviews
Expected Result: The application should display the business's rating and reviews.

Title: Verify user discretion
Preconditions: Device is turned on and connected to the internet
Test Steps:
1. Search for a business on the application
2. Visit the business
Expected Result: The user should use discretion and common sense when visiting the business. The application should not assume any responsibility for any problems or inconveniences that may occur during the visit.
